name: Bread Pudding with Jack Daniels Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Pudding
1. Cube bread. Set aside in a large mixing bowl.
2. Combine all ingredients except 1 cup butter. Mix well, and pour over bread.
3. Soak bread in milk mixture for 15 minutes.
4. Pour into a 13x9-inch buttered pan. Top bread mixture with cut up butter.
5. Bake at 325 degrees for 60 to 90 minutes, or until bread pudding mixture has risen 1-inch. Serve warm sauce over bread pudding.
Jack Daniels Sauce:
1. Mix sugar and water until dissolved.
2. Add butter, and simmer until melted.
3. Cook over high heat for 2 minutes.
4. Add Jack Daniels, and simmer for 3 to 5 minutes.
